dossier_layering.canon_public: Grounded directly in baseline NPC record plus linked polity/institution/locality support where available.
dossier_layering.gm_hidden: Conservative connective tissue derived from agenda, pressure, role logic, and relationship web; not promoted above asserted canon.

core_identity.hidden_identity: None explicitly asserted; hidden layer concerns pressure, leverage, and misread motive rather than a confirmed second identity.
core_identity.ethical_profile: Role-shaped ethics anchored to place, obligation, and consequence rather than free-floating abstraction.
core_identity.general_temperament: Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a door warden still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
core_identity.short_npc_pitch: Jalen Stone is a door warden anchored to The Whispering Well, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risky, or both in play.
core_identity.public_role: Jalen Stone is a door warden anchored to The Whispering Well, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risk

setting_placement.location_setting: The Whispering Well is the main site shaping this NPC's daily life.
who_they_answer_to: the procedural demands of The Whispering Well
who_depends_on_them: the continued function of The Whispering Well

public_vs_private.public_face: Known locally through day-to-day work as door warden. Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Jalen Stone as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.
public_vs_private.common_first_impression: Jalen Stone presents as Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a door warden still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
visible_flaws: can widen small matters through procedure
public_symbols: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Jalen Stone as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.
public_vs_private.private_truth: Keep The Whispering Well workable through the obligations of door warden while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity. Must keep visible order credible while absorbing the first shock of disorder, contraband, sabotage, or violence. Around The Whispering Well, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of door warden visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_hide: Must keep visible order credible while absorbing the first shock of disorder, contraband, sabotage, or violence. Around The Whispering Well, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of door warden visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_fear_being_known_for: The degree to which their usefulness depends on strain staying barely manageable.
public_vs_private.what_they_are_wrong_about: They may overestimate how much control role and procedure can preserve once pressure crosses a threshold.
public_vs_private.what_they_refuse_to_admit_to_themselves: That some of their identity is now fused to crisis-management rather than to the clean ideal of the role.

psychology.what_they_want_most: Useful clarity, respect for Door Warden, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Transpolity.
psychology.what_they_are_trying_to_protect_or_avoid: Keep The Whispering Well workable through the obligations of door warden while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
psychology.emotional_drive: Beneath the role sits a need for safe movement through contested routes, legibility, and a world that does not collapse into preventable noise.
psychology.core_wound: No singular foundational trauma is directly asserted in canon; the usable wound layer is role-shaped wear, exposure, and the cost of being the person who must notice first or answer last.
psychology.how_it_shaped_them: It turned ordinary duty into a personality contour: they scan for failure early, trust slowly, and measure strangers by downstream cost.
psychology.guiding_belief: If the system is kept legible, losses can still be bounded.
psychology.hidden_belief: Someone always pays for confusion; better it be controlled sooner than wider later.
psychology.lie_they_tell_themselves: That they are only doing the job and that the job has not already begun shaping what they are.
psychology.truth_they_are_avoiding: Their daily choices influence culture, fear, and legitimacy far beyond the narrow wording of the role.

thresholds.anger: being forced to absorb avoidable disorder
thresholds.fear: cascading failure that makes role performance meaningless
thresholds.power: clear information, recognized standing, and procedural initiative
thresholds.smallness: being bypassed, misfiled, or rendered decorative

morality_in_practice.how_they_justify_actions: By reference to burden, continuity, and the need to keep the surrounding place from slipping into a harder consequence tier.
morality_in_practice.what_they_consider_unforgivable: Willful sabotage of trust, records, access, or public safety tied to their role.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_absolutely_do: Delay, question, redirect, document, and escalate when place logic demands it.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_only_do_under_pressure: Leverage reputation, force, secrecy, or rigid procedure in ways that damage future trust.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_never_do: Act against corpus-confirmed identity or role logic without a visible pressure bridge.
morality_in_practice.relationship_to_good_evil: Operational read: Principled / Severe. Their danger lies less in theatrical evil than in what happens when role logic outruns compassion, nuance, or proportionality.

power_profile.why_they_matter: Jalen Stone can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
power_profile.why_hard_to_ignore: By enforcing Door Warden too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
power_profile.secondary_source_of_power: local familiarity, institutional memory, and other people needing something from them
power_profile.why_difficult_to_confront_directly: Confronting them usually means confronting place rules, witnesses, and downstream consequences rather than only the individual body in front of you.

capabilities.magic: Not explicitly stated unless separately asserted elsewhere in corpus.
capabilities.combat: Role-dependent; implied only to the degree their office already carries enforcement, survival, or defensive expectation.
capabilities.social: Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a door warden still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
capabilities.strategic_administrative: Performs the ongoing duties of door warden in and around The Whispering Well, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
capabilities.logistical_economic: Keep The Whispering Well workable through the obligations of door warden while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
capabilities.investigative_covert: Must keep visible order credible while absorbing the first shock of disorder, contraband, sabotage, or violence. Around The Whispering Well, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of door warden visibly slip.

signature_methods.how_they_typically_win: By controlling tempo, framing the problem first, and forcing others to deal with the local reality they represent.
signature_methods.how_they_escalate: If crossed, Jalen Stone adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
signature_methods.when_cornered: They narrow options, call on procedure or allies, and try to move the conflict onto terrain they understand better than the intruder.

systems_impact.cultural_effect: Ordinary people around The Whispering Well learn to speak, wait, disclose, or hide differently depending on whether Jalen Stone or people like them are part of the scene.

society_politics_geopolitics.ordinary_people_experience: Common folk experience Jalen Stone as a point where broader pressures become personal: papers checked, routes delayed, rites clarified, access granted, warnings issued, or burdens redirected.
society_politics_geopolitics.cultural_wound_or_benefit: They leave behind either increased legibility and trust or accumulated caution and narrowed speech.
society_politics_geopolitics.secondary_behaviors: People rehearse their story before approaching; they gather proof early; they watch who is seen speaking with this NPC.
factions_fear: actors who benefit from vagueness, delay, leakage, or unmanaged pressure
society_politics_geopolitics.governance_shift: At table scale, this NPC shifts how authority feels inside The Whispering Well: more navigable if cooperative, more costly if crossed.
society_politics_geopolitics.geopolitical_effect: Small incidents around Jalen Stone can propagate upward through Transpolity if they touch routes, records, trade, ritual legitimacy, or public order.

hooks.summary: Any task accepted from Jalen Stone may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.
Jalen Stone needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through The Whispering Well.

encounter_context.usual_environment: The Whispering Well: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response

best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Door Warden.
rumor: People say Jalen Stone is Known locally through day-to-day work as door warden. and rarely acts without a second motive.

provenance.support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
provenance.transformation_note: Dossier generated from existing named NPC architecture plus locally-linked support texts; unsupported hard biography intentionally withheld.
